# Texas Data Privacy and Security Act

Jurisdiction: United States - Texas
Region: US-TX
Citation: Texas Data Privacy and Security Act
Authority: Texas Legislature
Source URL: https://statutes.capitol.texas.gov/Docs/BC/htm/BC.541.htm
Topics: notice_transparency, consent, sensitive_data, data_subject_rights, third_party_sharing, automated_decision_making, marketing_opt_out, data_minimization, accountability
Keywords: Texas Data Privacy and Security Act, TDPSA, consumer, sensitive data, targeted advertising, sale, 德克萨斯

## Summary
Texas comprehensive privacy law with broad applicability, consumer rights, opt-outs, sensitive data consent, privacy notice, and data protection assessments.

## Key compliance obligations
- Support consumer rights and appeal process.
- Provide opt-out for targeted advertising, sale, and profiling.
- Obtain consent for sensitive data and conduct assessments for high-risk processing.
